violations.text: Ham, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Sausage was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit in an ice bath. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Reviewed proper cold holding procedures with PIC. More ice was added at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The establishment is using a special process of jarring (garlic honey) without approval from a process authority and the RIDOH. Garlic honey was voluntarily disposed of at time of inspection. The establishment must get all recipes approved from a process authority and obtain approval from the RIDOH-Center for Food Protection prior to selling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Various prepared foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The dumpster outside is located on dirt and gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2023
